summary: FORENSIC 60-TURN BENCHMARK RETEST - Production URL https://biqc.thestrategysquad.com. RESULTS: Soundboard PASS (5/5 = 100%), Board Room PASS (3/3 = 100%), War Room FAIL (0/3 = 0%). War Room consistently returns 'Unable to process.' error - Edge Function strategic-console-ai failing in production. Authentication and core platform working.

authentication_result.notes: Login works via /login-supabase. Redirects to /advisor correctly. Session maintained across module navigation.

quality_assessment.relevance: HIGH - Responses directly address business questions
quality_assessment.actionability: HIGH - Provides specific recommendations with action buttons

Risk summaries with specific deal names and amounts

UI renders correctly but API consistently fails
critical.rca_hypothesis: The Supabase Edge Function strategic-console-ai is either timing out, missing environment variables, or has a code error in production

The issue is in the Supabase Edge Function strategic-console-ai, not in the preview code

War Room (0%) is BROKEN due to Edge Function strategic-console-ai failure. The backend code fix for product_or_service validation has been deployed but the Edge Function itself is returning errors. Debug the Supabase Edge Function directly.

UI loads correctly, input works, but API response fails
Backend code correctly handles product_or_service (verified in boardroom.py lines 483-499)
Edge Function call at line 492-503 in boardroom.py is reaching the function but getting error response
